content: Use third-party services as data storage for this room. You can create a new folder or select the existing one in the connected storage.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a description for a toggle button or radio button that allows users to select third-party storage as data storage for a room. The description explains the purpose of using third-party services and provides context for the user's selection. It appears in various UI elements, including dialogs and backup settings.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'التحزين' is a spelling error (typo) for 'التخزين' (storage). While minor, in a technical UI context, incorrect spelling of core functional terms can be considered a critical quality issue.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: استخدم التخزين عبر طرف ثالث لحفظ بيانات هذه الغرفة. يمكنك إنشاء مجلد جديد، أو اختيار مجلد موجود في وحدة التخزين المتصلة.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Azerbaijani changes the meaning from a user action ('You can create...') to a passive future statement ('...will be created'), which misrepresents the UI's functional capability.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Bu otaq üçün məlumat yaddaşı kimi üçüncü tərəf xidmətlərindən istifadə edin. Əlaqələndirilmiş yaddaşda yeni qovluq yarada və ya mövcud olanı seçə bilərsiniz.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Bulgarian changes the meaning from 'You can create or select' to 'A new folder will be created', which is a prescriptive statement rather than an option provided to the user.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Използвайте услуги на трети страни като хранилище за данни за тази стая. Можете да създадете нова папка или да изберете съществуваща в свързаното хранилище.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Czech translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English says the user 'can create a new folder or select an existing one', whereas the Czech says 'a new folder will be created for storing data of this room', implying an automatic action rather than a user choice.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jako úložiště dat pro tuto místnost použijte služby třetích stran. V připojeném úložišti můžete vytvořit novou složku nebo vybrat již existující.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The German translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English says the user 'can create a new folder or select the existing one', implying a choice/action by the user. The German says 'A new folder... will be created', which implies an automatic system action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Verwenden Sie Drittanbieterdienste als Datenspeicher für diesen Raum. Sie können einen neuen Ordner erstellen oder einen vorhandenen im verbundenen Speicher auswählen.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Greek translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English says 'You can create a new folder or select the existing one', implying a choice. The Greek says 'A new folder will be created for the storage of this room's data', which sounds like an automatic action and omits the option to select an existing folder.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Χρησιμοποιήστε υπηρεσίες τρίτων ως χώρο αποθήκευσης δεδομένων για αυτό το δωμάτιο. Μπορείτε να δημιουργήσετε έναν νέο φάκελο ή να επιλέξετε έναν υπάρχοντα στον συνδεδεμένο αποθηκευτικό χώρο.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Spanish translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English says the user 'can create a new folder or select the existing one', implying a choice. The Spanish says 'a new folder will be created', which implies an automatic action and removes the user's ability to select an existing folder.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Utilice servicios de terceros como almacenamiento de datos para esta sala. Puede crear una nueva carpeta o seleccionar una existente en el almacenamiento conectado.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Finnish changes the meaning from 'You can create a new folder or select the existing one' to 'A new folder is created for storing this room's data', which implies an automatic action rather than a user choice.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Käytä kolmannen osapuolen palveluita tallennustilana tälle huoneelle. Voit luoda uuden kansion tai valita olemassa olevan yhdistetystä tallennustilasta.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Japanese translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English says the user 'can create a new folder or select an existing one' (user choice/action), whereas the Japanese says 'a new folder will be created' (automatic system action).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: このルームのデータ保存先として、サードパーティのサービスを利用します。接続されたストレージ内に、新しいフォルダを作成するか、既存のフォルダを選択できます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Korean changes the meaning from 'You can create or select' (user choice) to 'A new folder will be created' (automatic action).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 이 방의 데이터 스토리지로 제3자 서비스를 사용합니다. 연결된 스토리지에서 새 폴더를 생성하거나 기존 폴더를 선택할 수 있습니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the instruction 'You can create a new folder or select the existing one', instead stating that a new folder 'will be created', which changes the user's agency/choice described in the English text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ໃຊ້ການບໍລິການພາກສ່ວນທີສາມເປັນບ່ອນເກັບຂໍ້ມູນສໍາລັບຫ້ອງນີ້. ທ່ານສາມາດສ້າງໂຟນເດີໃໝ່ ຫຼື ເລືອກໂຟນເດີທີ່ມີຢູ່ແລ້ວໃນບ່ອນເກັບຂໍ້ມູນທີ່ເຊື່ອມຕໍ່.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English says the user 'can create a new folder or select the existing one', implying a choice. The Latvian says 'a new folder will be created for this room's data storage', which is a statement of fact/action rather than an option available to the user.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Izmantojiet trešās puses pakalpojumus kā šīs telpas datu krātuvi. Jūs varat izveidot jaunu mappi vai izvēlēties esošo pievienotajā krātuvē.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Dutch changes the meaning from a user action ('You can create...') to a passive statement about a folder being created ('Een nieuwe map... wordt aangemaakt'). It also introduces unnecessary repetition of 'gegevens' and changes the scope of the action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Gebruik diensten van derden als gegevensopslag voor deze ruimte. U kunt een nieuwe map aanmaken of een bestaande map selecteren in de aangesloten opslag.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English text says the user can 'create a new folder or select the existing one', whereas the Polish text states that a new folder 'will be created' (passive/future certainty), removing the user's choice to select an existing one.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Użyj usług podmiotów trzecich jako pamięci dla tego pokoju. Możesz utworzyć nowy katalog lub wybrać istniejący w podłączonej pamięci.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the option to 'select the existing [folder]' mentioned in the English source, stating only that a new folder will be created.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Utilizar serviços de terceiros como armazenamento de dados para esta sala. Você pode criar uma nova pasta ou selecionar uma existente no armazenamento conectado.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Russian translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English text says the user 'can create a new folder or select the existing one' (user choice/action), whereas the Russian text states 'a new folder will be created' (system action/automatic), omitting the option to select an existing folder.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Используйте сторонние сервисы в качестве хранилища данных для этой комнаты. Вы можете создать новую папку или выбрать существующую в подключенном хранилище.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Sinhala is grammatically broken and changes the meaning. The English says 'You can create a new folder or select the existing one', but the Sinhala says 'a new container will be created in the connected storage', which is a different instruction and lacks the option to 'select an existing one'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: මෙම කාමරයේ දත්ත ආචයනය සඳහා තෙවන පාර්ශ්ව සේවා භාවිතා කරන්න. ඔබට නව ෆෝල්ඩරයක් නිර්මාණය කළ හැකිය හෝ සම්බන්ධිත ආචයනයේ ඇති පවතින එකක් තෝරාගත හැකිය.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Slovak changes the meaning from a user action ('You can create...') to a passive system action ('A new folder will be created...'). It also fails to mention the option to 'select the existing one'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Použite služby tretích strán ako úložisko dát pre túto miestnosť. V pripojenom úložisku môžete vytvoriť nový priečinok alebo vybrať existujúci.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Slovenian changes the meaning from 'You can create a new folder or select the existing one' to 'A new folder for storing this room's data will be created in the connected storage', which removes the user's choice/option.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Uporabite storitve tretjih oseb kot shrambo podatkov za to sobo. V povezani shrambi lahko ustvarite novo mapo ali izberete obstoječo.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in Turkish changes the meaning from a user capability ('You can create...') to a passive future statement ('...will be created'), which misrepresents the UI functionality.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Bu oda için veri depolama olarak üçüncü taraf hizmetleri kullanın. Bağlı depolama alanında yeni bir klasör oluşturabilir veya mevcut olanı seçebilirsiniz.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence in the Ukrainian translation changes the meaning from a user choice ('You can create... or select...') to a definitive system action ('A new folder will be created...').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Використовуйте сторонні служби як сховище даних для цієї кімнати. Ви можете створити нову папку або вибрати існуючу у під’єднаному сховищі.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Vietnamese translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English says the user 'can create a new folder or select the existing one', but the Vietnamese says 'A new folder... will be created', which implies an automatic action rather than a user choice.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sử dụng dịch vụ của bên thứ ba làm nơi lưu trữ dữ liệu cho phòng này. Bạn có thể tạo thư mục mới hoặc chọn thư mục đã có trong bộ nhớ được kết nối.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation changes the meaning of the second sentence. The English says 'You can create a new folder or select the existing one', implying a choice/option. The Chinese says '启用后将在...创建一个新文件夹' (After enabling, a new folder will be created...), which implies an automatic action and omits the option to select an existing folder.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 使用第三方服务作为此房间的数据存储。您可以在已连接的存储空间中创建一个新文件夹或选择现有文件夹。
